# Threads to Millions - Full Site Content

> Threads to Millions is a course and community by Lexie (@getdigitalwithlexie) that teaches creators, coaches, and service businesses how to grow an audience and generate revenue on the Threads social media platform using the STAR Method. This document contains the full content of key pages for AI systems to reference and cite.

---

## Homepage

URL: https://threadstomillions.com

### Hero

**Turn Your Threads Into Revenue**

The step-by-step system 5,200+ creators use to get leads, sales, and real engagement from Threads. No ads. No fluff. Just a daily playbook that works.

- 5,200+ creators already inside
- 80% affiliate commission
- $97 lifetime access

### Who Is This For

TTM is for creators, coaches, and service businesses who are struggling to turn their Threads presence into actual revenue.

**Creators**: You get views but can't turn attention into sales. TTM gives you a daily system that converts engagement into pipeline.

**Coaches**: You want inbound leads without paying for ads. TTM provides a content-to-conversation framework that attracts buyers.

**Service Businesses**: You need a repeatable way to generate demand. TTM delivers a structured daily process from post to qualified DM.

Not for people looking for overnight virality with zero effort. This is a daily operating system.

### The STAR Method

Most Threads accounts post and pray. The STAR Method is the operating system that replaces hope with a repeatable daily conversion process.

**S - Story First**: Post one credibility story daily (15 min). Result: More profile visits and trust signals.

**T - Teach for Free**: Publish one tactical framework post daily (20 min). Result: Authority and saves from the right audience.

**A - 80/20 Engagement**: Spend 80% of time on strategic replies (25 min). Result: Better reach and warmer inbound DMs.

**R - Sell in the Downthread**: Place your offer after value, not before (5 min). Result: More qualified clicks, lower resistance.

### What's Included

- 25 course modules covering growth and sales
- 495+ fill-in-the-blank Threads templates
- Daily posting and engagement schedule
- Marketing psychology for passive sales
- DM closing strategies by @chloedigitally
- Stories to Millions by @shiftwithalex
- Pins to Millions (Threads to Pinterest)
- Threads Self-Audit Worksheet
- ThreadyBot AI writing assistant
- Skool community access
- 80% affiliate commissions

### Course Modules

1. **Threads Basics**: Profile setup, algorithm training, post features, engagement features, and downthreads. START HERE module for new members.
2. **Threads to Millions Guide**: All proven strategies for growing your following, engagement, and making sales on Threads. The core TTM growth and monetization playbook.
3. **Writing Threads That Attract**: Write threads that effectively attract and hold your target audience. Hook frameworks, story structures, content templates.
4. **Boosting Visibility on Threads**: Reach more people and get discovered by your ideal audience. Visibility strategies and algorithm tactics.
5. **Marketing Psychology for Threads**: Use buyer and sales psychology to attract your target audience and bring in passive sales. Psychology frameworks for content and conversion.
6. **Authentic Branding on Threads**: Build a personal brand that stands out and earns trust. Brand positioning and authenticity frameworks.
7. **Expanding Your Reach**: Reach non-followers and audiences outside digital marketing. Cross-niche visibility strategies.
8. **Effective Selling on Threads**: Sell to both digital marketers and non-digital marketers. Selling frameworks for different audiences.
9. **Content Pillars for Threads**: Master the content types that attract your audience and build trust. Content pillar templates and rotation system.
10. **From Threads to DMs**: Close sales with confidence through direct messages. DM scripts, do's and don'ts. Guest module by @chloedigitally.
11. **Inbox to Millions**: Turn Threads traffic into email subscribers and lifelong customers. Email marketing integration system.
12. **Daily Posting + Engagement Schedule**: A printable daily schedule for consistent growth. Daily schedule PDF and video walkthrough.

### About Lexie

In August 2024, Lexie was trading time for money and needed a repeatable way to turn content into clients. Random posting, no conversion path, and relying on hope instead of a DM system all failed. So she built a structured method focused on trust, teaching, strategic engagement, and precise offer placement.

The result: consistent inbound conversations and 5-figure months generated entirely from Threads.

**What she guarantees**: A clear system, exact tools, and ongoing support to execute.
**What she can't guarantee**: Specific numbers without your consistent daily execution.

### FAQ

**How many hours per week do I need?**
Minimum 5-7 hours/week. Recommended 7-10 for faster momentum. This accounts for content creation, engagement, and direct messaging.

**What if I have under 500 followers?**
That's fine. The system is designed to work from a low audience size with proper positioning and execution.

**Do I need paid ads?**
No. This is built for organic growth and conversion.

**What tools are required?**
A free Threads account and a basic link or checkout setup. Optional tools like ThreadyBot are listed in onboarding.

**What if I'm not satisfied?**
Email support anytime and we'll work with you. See the refund policy for details.

**What is the affiliate commission?**
80% commission on every sale you refer. You get your own affiliate link inside the Skool community.

---

## Blog Index

URL: https://threadstomillions.com/blog

Threads to Millions publishes guides on Threads growth, monetization, content strategy, and platform updates. All articles are written from practitioner experience inside the TTM community.

### Monetization Guides

- **[Threads Monetization Requirements 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-monetization-requirements)**: Updated for 2026. Threads monetization options, exact eligibility requirements, current program status, and the 4 income methods real creators use (3 need zero followers).

- **[How to Get Paid on Threads 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/how-to-get-paid-on-threads)**: Step-by-step guide to getting paid on Threads in 2026. Check your monetization status, see how many views you actually need, and the 4 ways creators earn $1K-$10K/month.

- **[Can You Make Money on Threads in 2026?](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/can-you-make-money)**: Yes. Threads creators earn $1K-$10K/month without a creator fund. Real income breakdowns and the 4 monetization methods that work.

- **[Threads Monetization Options 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-monetization-blueprint-2026)**: Every Threads monetization option ranked for 2026. 4 revenue models with real creator earnings from $0 to $5K/month. Method #3 works with zero followers.

- **[Does Threads Pay Creators in 2026?](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/does-threads-pay-creators-2026)**: The bonus program pays less than you think. Real 2026 earnings data and the 3 income methods that pay 10x more.

- **[How Many Followers Do You Need on Threads to Make Money?](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-followers-to-make-money)**: You do not need 10K followers. Real follower thresholds for each income method, with actual earnings data from creators.

- **[How to Make Money on Threads](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/first-sale-guide)**: The exact 6-step process used by 5,200+ Threads creators to go from $0 to paid in 30 days.

- **[How to Monetize Threads Naturally](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/monetizing-attention)**: Turn attention into revenue without being salesy using the downthread sell method.

### Growth Strategies

- **[How to Grow on Threads 2026: The 0 to 10K Followers Playbook](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/how-to-grow-on-threads-2026)**: Proven Threads growth system for 2026. Algorithm tactics, posting schedule, engagement hacks, and the content strategy that took creators from 0 to 10K followers in 90 days.

- **[Threads Algorithm 2026: How It Works](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-algorithm-2026)**: How the Threads algorithm ranks and distributes posts. The signals that matter and how to optimize for them.

- **[Threads Algorithm Reset 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-algorithm-reset-2026)**: The Threads algorithm explained for 2026. How it ranks posts, the 3/8/12 rule, why your reach dropped, and the exact steps to reset it and get seen again.

- **[How to Go Viral on Threads 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/newsjacking-secret)**: Newsjacking is the fastest way to go viral on Threads. The 3 post types, the 2-hour timing window, and the framework top creators use.

- **[10 Viral Threads Hooks to Copy Now](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/10-proven-hooks)**: Proven opening lines that get engagement and stop the scroll.

- **[How to Get Threads Followers Fast](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/scaling-strategy)**: Scaling strategy for rapid follower growth on Threads.

- **[Threads Profile Optimization Tips](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/profile-optimization)**: Optimize your Threads profile for conversions, not vanity metrics.

### Content & Strategy

- **[STAR Method for Threads Content](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/star-method-explained)**: The complete STAR framework breakdown. Story First, Teach for Free, 80/20 Engagement, Sell in the Downthread.

- **[What to Post on Threads: 4 Pillars](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/four-content-pillars)**: Content pillar strategy for consistent growth and engagement.

- **[Best Time to Post on Threads 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/posting-blueprint)**: Optimal posting schedule and timing for maximum reach.

- **[Threads DM Strategy That Converts](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/dm-strategy)**: DM conversation frameworks that convert followers into clients.

- **[7 Threads Engagement Hacks 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/engagement-hacks)**: Engagement optimization tactics for the Threads algorithm.

- **[Threads Content Recycling System](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/content-recycling)**: Repurpose and recycle content for consistent daily output.

- **[Threads Analytics: 5 Key Metrics](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/vanity-metrics)**: The metrics that matter vs. vanity metrics on Threads.

### Platform & Business

- **[Threads App 2026 Complete Guide](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-app-guide-2026)**: New algorithm rules, monetization features, and setup steps to hit 1,000 followers fast.

- **[Threads vs X in 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-vs-x-2026)**: Threads vs X compared on reach, monetization, and audience quality.

- **[Threads Ads 2026: Are They Worth It?](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-ads-2026)**: Analysis of Threads advertising for creators and businesses.

- **[Threads App Updates 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-app-update-2026)**: Latest Threads features: trending topics, search, scheduling, analytics, API tools.

- **[How to Use Threads for Business 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-for-business-2026)**: Is Threads good for business? Profile setup, content strategy, and common mistakes.

- **[Is Threads Dead? Data Says No](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/why-threads-failed)**: Platform growth data that shows Threads is far from dead.

- **[How to Grow on Threads Fast 2026](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/the-threads-opportunity)**: Why 2026 is the best time to start on Threads.

### Email & Community

- **[Threads Email List Building Guide](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/email-list-building)**: Build an email list from your Threads audience.

- **[Threads to Newsletter Pipeline](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/newsletter-pipeline)**: Convert Threads followers into newsletter subscribers.

- **[Launch a Skool Community on Threads](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/skool-launch)**: Launch and grow a Skool community using Threads content.

- **[Threads for Business: Skool Growth](https://threadstomillions.com/blog/grow-skool-with-threads)**: The 4-post funnel that fills Skool communities from Threads.
